channel.title: GeoPulse. Geopolitics in brief
channel.description: Signal-first briefings on geopolitics, edited by Lavkesh Dwivedi.

item.title: Trump Says Lebanon Cease-Fire Is Extended by 3 Weeks
item.description: The Israeli military extended its truce with Lebanon by three weeks, despite striking Hezbollah targets on Friday. The cease-fire aims to end the war in Iran. The Israeli military said it had struck Hezbollah targets on Friday, but its truce with Lebanon appeared to be holding.

item.title: Iran's top diplomat is expected to travel to Pakistan by this weekend for talks about a ceasefire
item.description: The talks come amid ongoing tensions between Iran and the US. Live updates: Iran's top diplomat is expected to travel to Pakistan by this weekend for talks about a ceasefire with the US AP News.

item.title: Indonesian U.N. Peacekeeper Dies Weeks After Blast in Lebanon
item.description: An Indonesian U. N. peacekeeper died weeks after a blast in Lebanon. The peacekeeper was serving with the U. N. Interim Force in Lebanon at the time of the incident. Peacekeeper Dies Weeks After Blast in Lebanon WSJ.

item.title: How long can Iran survive the US’s Hormuz blockade?
item.description: Iran is facing a US blockade of the Strait of Hormuz, which could severely impact its oil exports. The blockade has raised concerns about Iran's economic stability. And just how long can the US hold out?

item.title: Ranieri leaves advisory role at Roma following fallout with Gasperini
item.description: Claudio Ranieri has left his advisory role at Roma following a public disagreement with coach Jose Mourinho's assistant, Cristian Stellini, is not mentioned but the actual reason is with coach Jose Mourinho's assistant, Cristian Gasperini.

item.title: US mulls expelling Spain from Nato for failing to back war on Iran
item.description: The US considers expelling Spain from Nato for not backing the Iran war. US mulls expelling Spain from Nato for failing to back war on Iran Middle East Eye.

item.title: Israel and Lebanon extend ceasefire. And, Trump eases medical marijuana rules
item.description: Israel and Lebanon extended their ceasefire for three weeks. Israel and Lebanon have agreed to extend their ceasefire for three weeks, President Trump says. And, the Trump administration is easing rules on medical marijuana.

item.title: US considers suspending Spain from NATO, reported internal email suggests
item.description: A Pentagon email reveals US anger at Spain and the UK over Iran war tensions. Pentagon email obtained by Reuters reveals US anger at Spain and the UK as Iran war tensions persist.

item.title: Hegseth and Caine holding news conference on Iran war, as ceasefire grinds on but tension swirls in
item.description: Hegseth and Caine hold a news conference on the Iran war. Hegseth and Caine holding news conference on Iran war, as ceasefire grinds on but tension swirls in Strait of Hormuz CBS News.

item.title: Explosions by Israeli forces in south Lebanon despite ceasefire
item.description: Israeli forces carried out explosions in south Lebanon despite a ceasefire. Smoke rise above Khiam in southern Lebanon after Israel carries out explosions despite the ceasefire. Explosions by Israeli forces in south Lebanon despite ceasefire.

item.title: US-Iran ceasefire deal hangs in the balance as Israel, Lebanon slated for rare Washington talks
item.description: The US and Iran ceasefire deal is uncertain as Israel and Lebanon prepare for rare talks in Washington. US-Iran ceasefire deal hangs in the balance as Israel, Lebanon slated for rare Washington talks Fox News.

item.title: Defense Head Hegseth Weighs Punishing NATO Allies, Including Possible Spain Suspension, Report Says
item.description: US Defense Head Hegseth considers punishing NATO allies, including suspending Spain, according to a report. Defense Head Hegseth Weighs Punishing NATO Allies, Including Possible Spain Suspension, Report Says Kyiv Post.

item.title: Who Are The Bnei Menashe? The Indian Community That Believes It Belongs In Israel
item.description: Israel's Operation Wings of Dawn aims to bring the Bnei Menashe community from India to Israel by 2030. Israel's Operation Wings of Dawn aims to bring community members by 2030.

item.title: Divers use underwater speakers to help dying coral reefs
item.description: Divers use underwater speakers to help a dying coral reef near Jamaica recover. Divers are installing waterproof speakers in the ocean to help pull a coral reef near Jamaica back from the brinkThe northern coast of Jamaica once served as the backdrop for scenes in the James Bond thriller No Time to Die.

item.title: Nato says 'no provision' to expel members after report US could seek to suspend Spain
item.description: NATO states there is no provision to expel members after a report suggested the US might seek to suspend Spain. An internal Pentagon email reportedly outlines options to punish allies over a perceived lack of support for Iran war.

item.title: Spain is 'reliable' NATO member, PM says after reported US ouster threat
item.description: Spain's Prime Minister stated the country is a reliable NATO member after a reported US threat. Spain is 'reliable' NATO member, PM says after reported US ouster threat Tioga Publishing.

item.title: Chinese Foreign Minister and Thai Prime Minister agree to collaborate on fighting cyberscams
item.description: China and Thailand agreed to collaborate on fighting cyberscams as part of diplomatic relations. China is Thailand’s biggest trading partner, and the two countries celebrated their 50th anniversary of establishing diplomatic relations last year.

item.title: Norway to ban social media for under-16s
item.description: Norway will ban social media for under-16s, following similar moves by France and Denmark. Several European countries, such as France, Spain, and Denmark, have already said they will introduce a digital age of majority for social networks and others like Australia and Turkiye have already done so.

item.title: Environmental crisis in Russian city after drone attack on refinery
item.description: A drone attack on a Russian refinery in Tuapse sparked an environmental crisis. People in the Russian city of Tuapse are worried about the effects of an oil refinery fire after a Ukrainian attack.

item.title: Lebanon truce extended; Trump says time not on Tehran’s side
item.description: A truce in Lebanon was extended, while US President Donald Trump said time is not on Iran's side. The comments were made amid heightened tensions between the US and Iran. The situation in Lebanon remains fragile.
